members.name: GetEnd
members.summary: Returns the end position of the match within the source string. The end position of capturing groups can be retrieved by providing its group number as an integer or its string name (if it's a named group). The default value of 0 refers to the whole pattern. Returns -1 if the group did not match or doesn't exist.

members.name: GetGroupCount
members.summary: Returns the number of capturing groups.

members.name: GetStart
members.summary: Returns the starting position of the match within the source string. The starting position of capturing groups can be retrieved by providing its group number as an integer or its string name (if it's a named group). The default value of 0 refers to the whole pattern. Returns -1 if the group did not match or doesn't exist.

members.name: GetString
members.summary: Returns the substring of the match from the source string. Capturing groups can be retrieved by providing its group number as an integer or its string name (if it's a named group). The default value of 0 refers to the whole pattern. Returns an empty string if the group did not match or doesn't exist.

members.name: Names
members.summary: A dictionary of named groups and its corresponding group number. Only groups that were matched are included. If multiple groups have the same name, that name would refer to the first matching one.

members.name: Strings
members.summary: An [Array] of the match and its capturing groups.

members.name: Subject
members.summary: The source string used with the search pattern to find this matching result.
